children.text: operate extramural and intramural programs and distribute funds through grants, cooperative agreements, and other transactions and contracts;

ensure that activities under include investigations of radiation detection equipment in configurations suitable for deployment at seaports, which may include underwater or water surface detection equipment and detection equipment that can be mounted on cranes and straddle cars used to move shipping containers; andsection 592 of this title

have the authority to establish or contract with 1 or more federally funded research and development centers to provide independent analysis of homeland security issues and carry out other responsibilities under this subchapter.
